name: workspace

scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:local: pnpm --filter @workspace/tournament run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.local: pnpm run build:local && pnpm run start:local

//optionalDependencies: Windows-only native build binaries. Marked optional so pnpm skips them on Linux/mac deploys (os mismatch) but installs them on Windows dev machines.
